examples.text: الثَّقَافَاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ تُثْرِي الْعَالَمَ وَتَجْعَلُهُ مَكَانًا أَكْثَرَ تَنَوُّعًا وَإِثَارَةً
examples.english: Different cultures enrich the world and make it a more diverse and exciting place.

etymology.text:
Derived from the active participle of اِخْتَلَفَ (iḵtalafa, “to differ”).

Derived from the passive participle of اِخْتَلَفَ (iḵtalafa, “to differ”).
